text: Welcome aboard, @mentor_lina — glad to have you here. You’ve been approved as a mentor. Thanks for joining the community and bringing your experience with you.
Welcome aboard, @helper_alex — glad to have you in the community. You’ve been approved as a moderator. Jump into #introductions when you’re ready.
Welcome aboard, @guide_sam — glad to have you here. You’ve been approved as an event_helper. Feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions and check the event planning channel.
